is the 96th chapter of Fullmetal Alchemist.

Synopsis

This section needs expansion. You can help by adding to it.

Chapter Notes

In reference to the fact that Van Hohenheim ventured to the east while Father ventured to the west, the earthen dragons with which they attack each other are designed differently - with Father's attack resembling a traditional Western dragon while Van's attack resembles a traditional Eastern dragon.
